title: New Potato Nutty Delight
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring baked new potatoes with a nutty, velvety topping made from plant-based ingredients.

ingredients.name: new potatoes
ingredients.notes: preferably scrubbed to remove any dirt

ingredients.name: unsweetened almond milk or plant-based milk alternative
fresh herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: such as parsley, chives, or dill for garnish

instructions: Rinse and dry new potatoes. Pierce them with a fork in several places.
Place the potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with olive oil or avocado oil and sprinkle with salt.
Roast for about 40 minutes until tender, flipping halfway through cooking time.
In a blender or food processor, combine almond milk, almond butter, cocoa powder, and nutritional yeast. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour the mixture over the roasted potatoes and mix well to evenly coat them with the nutty topping.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
